nodes.name: Tavus Callback Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED — activate only after Tavus is configured AND the Tavus callback_url in clx-video-outreach-v1 is pointed at this workflow's production webhook URL. Payload shape expected: { video_id | data.video_id, status, hosted_url | download_url, thumbnail_url, duration | duration_seconds, total_cost, ... }. See OPERATIONS_HANDBOOK §15.5.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: null, node_name: 'video_ready_correlation_failed', error_code: 'VIDEO_RESULT_NO_MATCH', error_message: 'video_id ' + ($json.video_id || 'unknown') + ' not found in leads.video_request_id', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ video_url: $json.video_url || null, thumbnail_url: $json.thumbnail_url || null, duration_sec: $json.duration_sec || null, cost_usd: $json.cost_usd || null, status: $json.terminal_failed ? 'failed' : 'ready', completed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.id, node_name: 'tavus_ready_terminal_failure', error_code: 'VIDEO_GENERATION_FAILED', error_message: 'Tavus callback status=' + ($json.callback_status || 'unknown'), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.id, client_id: $json.client_id || null, channel: 'video', channel_status: $json.gmail_ok ? 'sent' : 'failed', subject: $json.video_email_subject || null, message_excerpt: 'Video: ' + ($json.video_url || '').slice(0, 200), provider_ref: $json.video_request_id || null, sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), metadata: { thumbnail_url: $json.thumbnail_url || null, duration_sec: $json.duration_sec || null, cost_usd: $json.cost_usd || null, gmail_message_id: $json.gmail_message_id || null, error: $json.gmail_error || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Handle Gmail Send Result').first().json.id, node_name: 'video_email_send_failed', error_code: 'VIDEO_DELIVERY_FAILED', error_message: ($('Handle Gmail Send Result').first().json.gmail_error || 'unknown').toString().slice(0, 500), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
